meta.title: Systemic — CRM para pequeñas y medianas empresas
meta.description: Clientes, citas, ventas, inventario, finanzas y comunicaciones — todo en un solo sistema.

hero.title: CRM para pequeñas y medianas empresas
hero.subtitle: Clientes, citas, ventas, inventario, finanzas y comunicaciones — todo en un solo sistema. Comienza en 5 minutos.
hero.trustLine: Inicio gratuito · Sin tarjeta de crédito

painPoints.title: ¿Te suena familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: Systemic resuelve los desafíos diarios de los pequeños negocios

items.title: Los clientes se pierden
items.description: Contactos dispersos entre libretas, mensajeros y hojas de cálculo. Sin una base de datos única con historial de interacciones.

items.title: Finanzas en caos
items.description: No conoces tu ganancia real. La caja no cuadra, los salarios se calculan manualmente, los gastos se pierden.

items.title: Inventario sin control
items.description: Los productos se agotan inesperadamente. Sin seguimiento de existencias, bajas ni compras.

items.title: Todo manual, todo lento
items.description: Horas en rutina: citas en libretas, facturas en Excel, recordatorios de memoria. El negocio no puede escalar.

features.title: Todo lo que tu negocio necesita
features.subtitle: Desde la cita del cliente hasta el resultado financiero — una herramienta en lugar de diez

items.title: Base de clientes
items.description: Fichas de clientes con historial de visitas, compras, contactos y categorías. Búsqueda y filtros por cualquier campo.

items.title: Calendario de citas
items.description: Calendario drag-and-drop con citas recurrentes, múltiples servicios y filtro por profesional.

items.title: Ventas y pedidos
items.description: Ciclo completo de pedidos: crear, confirmar, empaquetar, enviar. Integración con Nova Poshta.

items.title: Gestión de inventario
items.description: Productos, existencias, compras, movimientos de stock. Baja automática en ventas.

items.title: Módulo financiero
items.description: Transacciones, caja, turnos, resultados financieros. Visión completa de ingresos y gastos en tiempo real.

items.title: Bot de Telegram
items.description: Mensajería bidireccional con clientes, recordatorios automáticos de citas — directamente en Telegram.

items.title: Nóminas y motivación
items.description: Esquemas flexibles de motivación: porcentaje de servicios, tarifa fija, bonificaciones. Cálculo automático.

items.title: Recibos fiscales (Checkbox)
items.description: Integración con el registrador fiscal Checkbox. Recibos fiscales conforme a la legislación ucraniana.

showcases.title: Clientes y citas — todo bajo control
showcases.description: Base de datos unificada con historial completo: visitas, compras, mensajes. Calendario drag-and-drop para planificación rápida del día.
bullets: Fichas de clientes con categorías y etiquetas

showcases.title: Del pedido a la entrega
showcases.description: Crea pedidos, controla estados, envía por Nova Poshta. Baja automática del inventario y creación de guías.
bullets: Flujo completo de estados de pedido

showcases.title: Finanzas y analítica en tiempo real
showcases.description: Sabe cuánto ganas cada día. Caja, transacciones, resultados financieros, nóminas — todo automático.

howItWorks.title: Comienza en 5 minutos
howItWorks.subtitle: Tres simples pasos para automatizar tu negocio

steps.title: Regístrate
steps.description: Crea una cuenta y configura tu negocio: nombre, ubicaciones, servicios.

steps.title: Añade tu equipo
steps.description: Invita al personal, configura roles y horarios de trabajo.

steps.title: ¡A trabajar!
steps.description: Registra clientes, vende productos, controla finanzas. Todo en un solo lugar.

pricing.title: Precios transparentes
pricing.subtitle: Sin cargos ocultos. Todos los módulos incluidos.

items.name: Andriy M.
items.text: El bot de Telegram es pura magia. Los clientes reciben recordatorios y vemos sus respuestas directamente en el CRM.

items.name: Serhiy M.
items.text: Por fin todo en un solo lugar. Antes llevábamos registros en cuadernos y finanzas en Excel. Ahora veo todo el panorama en 5 minutos.

items.name: Iryna D.
items.text: El inventario y las ventas funcionan a la perfección. Enviamos pedidos por Nova Poshta directamente desde el sistema.

items.question: ¿Necesito instalar algún programa?
items.answer: No. Systemic funciona en el navegador — en computadora, tableta y teléfono. No hay nada que instalar.

items.question: ¿Hay un plan gratuito?
items.answer: Sí, el plan Starter es gratuito para siempre. Puedes cambiar a un plan de pago cuando tu negocio necesite más funciones.

items.question: ¿Puedo migrar datos de otro sistema?
items.answer: Sí, te ayudaremos a migrar tus datos desde Excel u otro CRM. Contacta a nuestro equipo de soporte.

items.question: ¿Funciona en el móvil?
items.answer: Sí, la interfaz adaptativa funciona en cualquier dispositivo con navegador — smartphone, tableta, portátil.

items.question: ¿Hay integración con caja registradora fiscal?
items.answer: Sí, integración con el registrador fiscal Checkbox para crear recibos fiscales conforme a la legislación ucraniana.

items.question: ¿Cuántos empleados puedo agregar?
items.answer: En el plan gratuito — hasta 2. En los planes de pago — sin límite.

cta.title: ¿Listo para automatizar tu negocio?
cta.subtitle: Únete a Systemic — comienza gratis hoy

footer.tagline: CRM para pequeñas y medianas empresas

terms.title: Términos de servicio — Systemic CRM
terms.effectiveDate: Fecha de vigencia: 18 de marzo de 2026
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. These Terms of Service (hereinafter — "Terms") govern the relationship between LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK" (hereinafter — "Provider") and an individual or legal entity (hereinafter — "User") using the Systemic CRM cloud service (hereinafter — "Service"), available at https://app.systemic-crm.com.

1.2. By registering for the Service, the User fully and unconditionally accepts these Terms.

1.3. The Provider reserves the right to amend the Terms by notifying the User at least 14 days before the changes take effect, via email or an in-app notification.

2. Description of the Service

2.1. Systemic CRM is a cloud-based customer, appointment, finance, and staff management system for small and medium-sized businesses.

2.2. The Service is provided on a SaaS (Software as a Service) subscription basis.

2.3. The Provider continuously improves the Service and reserves the right to add, modify, or remove functionality without prior notice, provided such changes do not materially affect the core features of the User's paid plan.

3. Registration and Account

3.1. To use the Service, the User must create an account by providing a valid email address and business name.

3.2. The User is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their password and for all actions performed under their account.

3.3. The User must immediately notify the Provider of any unauthorized access to their account.

3.4. One account corresponds to one business (tenant). Creating multiple free accounts to circumvent plan limitations is prohibited.

4. Pricing Plans and Payment

4.1. The Service offers the following plans: Trial (7 days free), Start, Business, and Pro. Current pricing and feature lists are available on the pricing page within the Service.

4.2. Payments are processed monthly via the LiqPay payment system. Subscriptions renew automatically each month.

4.3. The User may cancel their subscription at any time. Access to the paid plan remains active until the end of the current billing period.

4.4. Refunds are available within 14 days of payment, provided the User has not made substantial use of the Service during that period. No refunds are issued after 14 days.

4.5. The Provider may change prices by giving the User at least 30 days' notice. New prices take effect from the next billing period.

5. User Rights and Obligations

5.1. The User has the right to:

  • use the Service in accordance with their paid plan;
  • export their data at any time;
  • delete their account and all associated data.

5.2. The User agrees to:

  • not use the Service for illegal activities;
  • not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' data;
  • not overload the Service with automated requests (scraping, DDoS);
  • not share account access with third parties without the Provider's consent.

6. Provider Rights and Obligations

6.1. The Provider undertakes to:

  • maintain Service availability of at least 99% per month (excluding scheduled maintenance);
  • maintain the confidentiality of User data;
  • provide at least 24 hours' notice of scheduled maintenance.

6.2. The Provider reserves the right to:

  • suspend User access in the event of a breach of these Terms;
  • suspend access in the event of non-payment after the paid period expires;
  • delete data of inactive free accounts 90 days after the trial period ends.

7. Limitation of Liability

7.1. The Service is provided "as is." The Provider does not guarantee that the Service will operate without interruption or error.

7.2. The Provider's maximum liability is limited to the amount paid by the User for the last 3 months of Service usage.

7.3. The Provider is not liable for:

  • data loss resulting from User actions;
  • outages caused by third parties (hosting provider, payment system, internet service provider);
  • indirect damages or lost profits.

8. Intellectual Property

8.1. All rights to the Service, its code, design, and trademarks belong to the Provider.

8.2. Data uploaded by the User remains the property of the User.

8.3. The Provider does not use User data for AI model training, analytics, or sale to third parties.

9. Termination

9.1. The User may stop using the Service at any time by deleting their account in the settings.

9.2. The Provider may terminate the User's access to the Service in the event of:

  • systematic breach of these Terms;
  • non-payment for 30 days after the paid period expires;
  • use of the Service for illegal activities.

9.3. Upon account deletion, all User data is removed within 30 days.

10. Dispute Resolution

10.1. All disputes shall be resolved through negotiation. If an agreement cannot be reached, disputes shall be settled in accordance with the applicable laws of Ukraine.

10.2. These Terms are governed by the laws of Ukraine.

11. Contact Information

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397

privacy.title: Política de privacidad — Systemic CRM
privacy.effectiveDate: Fecha de vigencia: 18 de marzo de 2026
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. This Privacy Policy (hereinafter — "Policy") describes how LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK" (hereinafter — "Provider," "we") collects, uses, stores, and protects the personal data of users of the Systemic CRM service (hereinafter — "Service").

1.2. By using the Service, you agree to the terms of this Policy.

1.3. We comply with the requirements of the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Personal Data" and, when processing data of EU residents, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

2. Data We Collect

2.1. Data you provide during registration:

  • Email address
  • Password (stored in encrypted form in Firebase Authentication)
  • Business name
  • Contact person's name

2.2. Data you enter while using the Service:

  • Customer information (names, phone numbers, notes)
  • Appointments, orders, financial transactions
  • Staff data (names, contacts, schedules)
  • Integration settings (API keys are stored in encrypted form)

2.3. Data collected automatically:

  • IP address (for security and audit purposes)
  • Browser and device type
  • Error data (via Sentry — without personal data)

3. How We Use Your Data

3.1. Your data is used exclusively for:

  • Providing and improving the Service
  • Authentication and account security
  • Sending service notifications (payments, Service changes)
  • Technical support

3.2. We do NOT use your data for:

  • Selling or sharing with third parties
  • Marketing communications without your consent
  • Training artificial intelligence models
  • Profiling or targeted advertising

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1. Data is stored on Google Cloud Platform servers (Firebase/Firestore) in European data centers.

4.2. We apply the following security measures:

  • Data encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS)
  • Encryption of sensitive fields (API keys, integration passwords)
  • Authentication via Firebase Authentication
  • Data isolation between different businesses (tenants)
  • Regular backups
  • Audit logs of all changes

4.3. Access to the database is restricted to authorized technical personnel of the Provider.

5. Data Sharing with Third Parties

5.1. We use the following third-party services for the operation of the Service:

ServicePurposeData Received
Google FirebaseDatabase hosting, authenticationAll Service data
VercelWeb application and API hostingRequest logs (IP, URL)
LiqPayPayment processingEmail, payment amount
SentryError monitoringTechnical data (no PII)
ResendEmail notificationsRecipient email addresses

5.2. Each of these services has its own privacy policy and meets security standards.

5.3. We do not sell or share your data with any other third parties, except as required by law.

6. Third-Party Integrations

6.1. The Service supports integrations with Telegram, Nova Poshta, Checkbox, Rozetka, Prom.ua, and other services.

6.2. Data is shared with these services only at the User's initiative and only to the extent necessary for the integration to function.

6.3. API keys and passwords for integrations are stored in encrypted form and are never transmitted to the client device.

7. Your Rights

7.1. You have the right to:

  • Access — obtain a copy of all your data (via the "Export Data" feature in the Service)
  • Rectification — modify or update your data at any time
  • Erasure — delete your account and all associated data (via the "Delete Account" option in settings)
  • Restriction of processing — request suspension of your data processing
  • Portability — receive your data in a machine-readable format (JSON)

7.2. To exercise these rights, contact support@systemic-crm.com. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Cookies

8.1. The Service uses only technical cookies necessary for:

  • Maintaining an authenticated session (Firebase Auth)
  • Saving interface preferences (language, theme)

8.2. We do not use marketing, analytics, or advertising cookies.

9. Data Retention and Deletion

9.1. Data of active accounts is retained for the entire duration of Service usage.

9.2. After account deletion:

  • Database records are deleted within 30 days
  • Backups containing your data are deleted within 90 days
  • Error logs in Sentry are retained for 90 days
  • Server logs in Vercel are retained for 30 days

9.3. Data of inactive free accounts is deleted 90 days after the trial period ends.

10. Changes to This Policy

10.1. We may update this Policy. We will notify you of material changes via email or an in-app notification at least 14 days in advance.

10.2. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

11. Contact Information

For privacy and data protection inquiries:

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397
